read.abares 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • read.abares

Get Historical State Estimates from ABARES

get_historical_state_estimates.Rd

Get Historical State Estimates from ABARES

Usage

get_historical_state_estimates()

get_hist_sta_est()

Value

A data.table::data.table object with the variable field as the key.

Note

Columns are renamed and reordered for consistency.

Examples

 get_historical_state_estimates()
#> Key: <Variable>
#>                                  Variable  Year             State      Industry
#>                                    <char> <int>            <char>        <char>
#>      1: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales All Broadacre
#>      2: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales          Beef
#>      3: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales      Cropping
#>      4: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales         Dairy
#>      5: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales         Mixed
#>     ---                                                                        
#> 184454:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia          Beef
#> 184455:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia      Cropping
#> 184456:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia         Mixed
#> 184457:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia         Sheep
#> 184458:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia    Sheep-Beef
#>          Value   RSE
#>          <num> <int>
#>      1:    210   118
#>      2:    110    49
#>      3:      0    NA
#>      4:   3260    12
#>      5:     60    98
#>     ---             
#> 184454:    100   108
#> 184455:  96000    19
#> 184456: 162200    13
#> 184457: 106500    19
#> 184458:  84500    22

 # or shorter
 get_hist_sta_est()
#> Key: <Variable>
#>                                  Variable  Year             State      Industry
#>                                    <char> <int>            <char>        <char>
#>      1: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales All Broadacre
#>      2: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales          Beef
#>      3: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales      Cropping
#>      4: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales         Dairy
#>      5: AI stud fees and herd testing ($)  1990   New South Wales         Mixed
#>     ---                                                                        
#> 184454:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia          Beef
#> 184455:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia      Cropping
#> 184456:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia         Mixed
#> 184457:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia         Sheep
#> 184458:                 Wool receipts ($)  2022 Western Australia    Sheep-Beef
#>          Value   RSE
#>          <num> <int>
#>      1:    210   118
#>      2:    110    49
#>      3:      0    NA
#>      4:   3260    12
#>      5:     60    98
#>     ---             
#> 184454:    100   108
#> 184455:  96000    19
#> 184456: 162200    13
#> 184457: 106500    19
#> 184458:  84500    22
